title: Carry out basic vehicle servicing operations
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out basic vehicle servicing operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan to carry out basic vehicle servicing operations

pcs.text: Identify task requirements and vehicle to be serviced from task instructions 1.2 Obtain and interpret basic vehicle servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and report to workplace supervisor1.4 Implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify task requirements and vehicle to be serviced from task instructions 1.2 Obtain and interpret basic vehicle servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and report to workplace supervisor1.4 Implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify task requirements and vehicle to be serviced from task instructions 1.2 Obtain and interpret basic vehicle servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and report to workplace supervisor1.4 Implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.title: Carry out basic vehicle servicing operations

pcs.text: Carry out basic vehicle servicing operations according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify and record worn vehicle components and issues requiring further exploration according to workplace procedures2.3 Record basic vehicle servicing operation procedures according to workplace procedures
